item.title: Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 1min “I still stand by what I said straight after the game that he was celebrating me missing a doub
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 1min “I still stand by what I said straight after the game that he was celebrating me missing a double.”
Gian van Veen dismisses Luke Littler’s claims that he was only celebrating towards his girlfriend Faith.
Full story: https:// oche180.com/van-veen-doubl es-down-on-littler-claims/ …
In association with Mostrar más 15

item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 3min A legendary walk-on in Rotterdam...
10 years on and we still have goosebumps!
Premier
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 3min A legendary walk-on in Rotterdam...
10 years on and we still have goosebumps!
Premier League Darts Thursday, 16 April Night 10 - Rotterdam 1900 CEST | 1800 BST 1 2 19 1 mil

item.title: philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 6min Can't call it a theatre, but they're packed in at the sports centre of dreams. 2 4 125
item.description: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 6min Can't call it a theatre, but they're packed in at the sports centre of dreams. 2 4 125
